context: This policy governs reimbursement of out-of-pocket expenses incurred by Shiloh Baptist Church Building Committee members and authorized staff in the course of church business.

validation_rules.requirement: Original itemized receipt must accompany all reimbursement requests
validation_rules.notes: Digital photos of receipts accepted via email to gloria.tate@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org

validation_rules.requirement: Expenses exceeding $100 require prior written approval from Committee Chair
validation_rules.action: Hold for Chair approval before reimbursement
validation_rules.notes: Email approval from Deacon Marcus Pittman is acceptable

validation_rules.requirement: Only church-related business expenses are reimbursable
validation_rules.notes: Meals only reimbursed during off-site church business travel

validation_rules.requirement: Reimbursement requests must be submitted within 30 days of expense
validation_rules.action: Deny late submissions unless extraordinary circumstances

validation_rules.requirement: Building Fund expenses must be coded separately from general operating expenses
validation_rules.action: Route building-related expenses to Building Fund account
validation_rules.notes: Contact Deacon Pittman if unsure of proper classification

validation_rules.requirement: Church business travel reimbursed at current IRS standard rate
validation_rules.action: Require mileage log with trip purpose

validation_rules.requirement: Cash advances are not provided; members pay out of pocket and submit for reimbursement
validation_rules.action: Redirect advance requests to Committee Chair for special circumstances

validation_rules.requirement: Single purchase over $500 requires two committee member signatures
validation_rules.notes: Deacon Pittman and one other committee member must both approve
